etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "submit" + "-ive" from Latin "submittere" + "-ive" (tending to yield)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Tending yield; experiencing yielding compliant and submissive yielding supported by empowerment awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Tending yield → yielding compliant → contemporary submissive yielding and submissive compliant that benefits from autonomy growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Tending yield → yielding compliant → submissive yielding → autonomy understanding
